$comment: Accumulator for non-blocking questions raised during bootstrap or operate mode, and for deferred blocking questions when the user is temporarily unavailable. Orchestrator surfaces these at session boundaries.
purpose: Accumulate questions raised by subagents or the orchestrator that do not halt the current session but require resolution.

on_read: Before ending a session, surface every entry to the user
An entry with blocking: true must be resolved before the session may complete
Stale entries (older than one run without user contact) are re-surfaced, not silently dropped
